nodes.name: Keyword Ideas

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ keywords: $json.__seed_terms, location_name: $json.__location, language_name: $json.__language, limit: 100, order_by: ['keyword_info.search_volume,desc'] }]) }}

nodes.name: Write Keywords

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__rows || []).map((r) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, seed: $json.__seed, run_date: $json.__run_date, keyword: r.keyword, search_volume: r.search_volume, keyword_difficulty: r.keyword_difficulty, cpc: r.cpc, competition: r.competition, intent: r.intent, cluster_label: r.cluster_label, source_facts: { search_volume: r.search_volume, keyword_difficulty: r.keyword_difficulty, cpc: r.cpc, competition: r.competition, keyword_id: r.keyword_id } }))) }}
